name: AI Humanizer Suite
description: Six free online tools that rewrite AI-generated text so it reads like a human wrote it, plus an AI content detector. Built for students, content marketers, authors, and freelancers. Bilingual English / Chinese. No signup. No tracking. No installation. Privacy-respecting — stateless API, immediate input discard, never trained on user data.

tools.name: AI Humanizer
tools.short_description: Generic AI text rewriter. Bypasses GPTZero, Turnitin AI, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT, Copyleaks.
tools.long_description: A free online tool that rewrites AI-generated text from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, Jasper, Copy.ai, and any other LLM into natural human-sounding prose. Engineered against GPTZero, Turnitin AI, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT, and Copyleaks. Bilingual English / Chinese. 3,000 characters per submission, 5 submissions per IP per day. No signup.

tools.name: AI Essay Humanizer
tools.short_description: Student essay rewriter. Preserves thesis, citations, dates, numbers.
tools.long_description: An AI essay humanizer specifically tuned for student essays. Preserves thesis, argument structure, citations, dates, and proper nouns. Rewrites surface expression in a tone that sounds like a real student author — not academic boilerplate. 85-95% pass rate on English essays up to 3,000 characters against GPTZero, Turnitin AI, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT. Bilingual.

tools.name: Turnitin AI Bypass
tools.short_description: Specifically engineered against Turnitin's AI detection algorithm.
tools.long_description: A free online rewriter specifically calibrated against Turnitin's AI detection algorithm: sentence-level perplexity, burstiness, AI vocabulary density, and predictable paragraph transitions. 85-95% pass rate on English essays up to 3,000 characters. Preserves citations, facts, dates, and proper nouns. Bilingual English / Chinese.

tools.name: Walterwrites AI
tools.short_description: Rewrite AI text in the natural Walter Writes style — the style AI detectors misclassify as human.
tools.long_description: An online rewriter that converts AI-generated text into the Walter Writes style — short paragraphs, conversational tone, parenthetical asides, second-person voice, direct opinions. This style achieves high perplexity and high burstiness, which are exactly the signals AI detectors (GPTZero, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT) use to identify human writing. Best for blog posts, marketing content, emails, and social media. Not for academic essays. Bilingual.

tools.name: AI Detector
tools.short_description: AI content detector. Returns AI probability score, verdict, and 5 detection signals.
tools.long_description: A free online AI content detector based on the same principles as GPTZero, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT. Analyzes sentence length uniformity, AI vocabulary density, perplexity, burstiness, predictable paragraph transitions. Returns structured JSON output: AI probability 0-100, human probability 0-100, verdict (Likely AI / Likely Human / Uncertain), and 5 specific detection signals. Calibrated, not paranoid — real authors using contractions, fragments, and first-person voice are not flagged. Bilingual.

tools.name: 降 AI 率
tools.short_description: 降低中文论文 AI 率。改写知网 AIGC、维普、GPTZero 中文、ZeroGPT 中文 都识别不出的 AI 八股词。
tools.long_description: 一个免费在线中文论文 AI 率降低工具。专门针对中文 AI 检测器 (知网 AIGC、维普、GPTZero 中文模型、ZeroGPT 中文) 的算法反向工程,改写所有 AI 八股词 ('赋能' → '帮助/推动','抓手' → '方法/路径','底层逻辑' → '核心思路','链路' → '环节','生态位' → '位置','范式' → '模式','价值闭环' → '完整流程','降维打击' → '突破'),用自然中文作者口吻替换。3000 字以内的中文段落,AI 率可从 80%+ 降到 20% 以下。保留论点、引用、数据、术语。
keywords: 降 ai 率 工具
